title: Einstein Prediction
description: Represents a prediction result from Salesforce Einstein, including score, label, and explanatory factors.

predictionDefinitionId.description: ID of the prediction definition that generated this prediction.

recordId.description: Salesforce record ID the prediction applies to.

score.description: Prediction confidence score, typically between 0.0 and 1.0.

numericValue.description: Predicted numeric value for numeric predictions.

prescriptions.description: Recommended actions to improve the predicted outcome.

modelId.description: ID of the model used for the prediction.

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the prediction was generated.

PredictionFactor.description: A factor that influenced the prediction outcome.

featureName.description: Name of the feature or field.

featureValue.description: Value of the feature for this prediction.

direction.description: Whether the factor positively or negatively affects the prediction.

Prescription.description: A recommended action to improve the predicted outcome.

impact.description: Expected impact of the action on the outcome.
